product_overview: Golden Park Station is a multi-service web app for a premium station and rest area where customers can order food, book pool access, and reserve hotel stays. It also includes phone-based account access and protected staff/admin areas for operational management.
core_goals: Browse restaurant offerings and place food orders
Reserve hotel rooms for selected dates
Access and manage a user profile with order history and profile details
Scan QR codes to access mapped service routes
Use staff and admin areas for operational oversight

features.name: Phone OTP Authentication and Profile Access
features.description: Allows a user to access their profile through phone-based OTP authentication and view account-related information such as wallet balance and history.
user_flows: Navigate to /profile -> Enter phone number -> Request OTP -> Enter received OTP -> See profile details, wallet balance, and history
Navigate to /profile -> Enter phone number -> Request OTP -> Enter an incorrect OTP -> See validation feedback and remain on the authentication step

features.name: QR Code Scanning
features.description: Lets a user scan a QR code to open the service route mapped to that code.
user_flows: Navigate to /scan -> Open camera -> Scan a valid QR code -> See redirected service route
Navigate to /scan -> Open camera -> Scan a QR code -> See the app open the mapped destination for that token

features.name: Restaurant Ordering
features.description: Lets a user browse the restaurant menu, add items to a cart, and complete checkout using available payment options.
user_flows: Navigate to /restaurant -> Browse menu categories -> Add items to cart -> Review cart -> Checkout with cash or online payment -> See order submitted
Navigate to /restaurant -> Browse menu categories -> Add items to cart -> Continue shopping -> Add more items -> Review updated cart totals -> Checkout
Navigate to /restaurant -> Add items to cart -> Proceed to checkout -> Choose dining location -> Submit the order -> See confirmation and active order state
Navigate to /restaurant -> Add items to cart -> Proceed to checkout -> Submit the order without completing required selections -> See validation feedback and remain in checkout

features.name: Hotel Room Booking
features.description: Lets a user browse hotel room options and reserve a room for selected stay dates.
user_flows: Navigate to /hotel -> Browse available room types -> Select a room -> Choose check-in and check-out dates -> Submit reservation -> See booking confirmation
Navigate to /hotel -> Browse available room types -> Select a room -> Enter dates with an invalid stay range -> See validation feedback and remain on the booking form

features.name: Pool Booking
features.description: Lets a user purchase pool access tickets and receive a booking that can later be validated by staff.
user_flows: Navigate to /services/pool -> Select ticket quantity and type -> Submit booking -> See pool reservation confirmation
Navigate to /services/pool -> Select ticket quantity and type -> Submit booking -> See the booking reflected for later QR validation

features.name: User Profile Management
features.description: Lets a user update profile information and manage account details from the profile area.
user_flows: Navigate to /profile -> View profile information -> Edit personal details -> Save changes -> See updated profile information
Navigate to /profile -> View profile information -> Edit personal details with invalid input -> Save changes -> See validation feedback and keep the current profile data

features.name: Staff Portal
features.description: Provides staff access to their protected portal for operational work.
user_flows: Navigate to /staff -> Access the staff portal -> See the staff dashboard after authentication

features.name: Admin Dashboard
features.description: Provides administrators access to a protected dashboard for management tasks.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin -> Access the admin dashboard -> See the management dashboard after authentication

features.name: QR Code Scanning
features.description: Scan table or room QR codes to access specific services
user_interactions: Redirect to mapped route based on token

features.name: Restaurant Ordering
features.description: Browse menu and add items to cart, then checkout
user_interactions: Checkout with cash or online payment
